Container.Name: unraid-icon-manager
Container.Overview: Manage icons for deployed Docker containers. Saving updates the gallery, template and cache; explicit Sync atomically updates Compose Manager override metadata when applicable and recreates only the selected container so Unraid reads its new immutable icon label. Trusted LAN only.

Config.Name: Application data
Config.Description: Database, icon and wallpaper galleries, audits and backups

Config.Name: Docker Manager templates
Config.Description: Required to update icon template metadata

Config.Name: Persistent icon cache
Config.Description: Required to invalidate only changed Docker Manager icon cache files

Config.Name: RAM icon cache
Config.Description: Required to invalidate only changed runtime Docker Manager icon cache files

Config.Name: Compose Manager projects
Config.Description: Compose Manager PROJECTS_FOLDER; used only to update the selected service icon in docker-compose.override.yml

Config.Name: Docker socket
Config.Description: Reads containers and recreates only explicitly synchronized targets so immutable icon labels update

Config.Name: VM icon directory
Config.Description: Optional: fill only when Unraid VM Manager is enabled

Config.Name: libvirt socket
Config.Description: Optional: fill only when VM Manager is enabled; grants full VM management authority

Config.Name: Icon host path
Config.Description: Host-side location matching /config/icons; uploads are served through the public URL below

Config.Name: Compose Manager host root
Config.Description: Host path used in com.docker.compose.project.working_dir labels; must match the Compose Manager PROJECTS_FOLDER mount above

Config.Name: Compose Manager container root
Config.Description: Container path for the Compose Manager projects mount; normally do not change

Config.Name: Public icon base URL
Config.Description: Required for uploads: URL that the Unraid host can fetch, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8787

Config.Name: Maximum wallpaper bytes
Config.Description: Maximum uploaded or downloaded wallpaper size, default 30 MiB

Config.Name: Unraid Docker page URL
Config.Description: URL opened by Refresh Docker Page, e.g. http://192.168.1.10/Docker or your custom port

Config.Name: Unraid VM page URL
Config.Description: URL opened after changing a VM icon, e.g. http://192.168.1.10/VMs

Config.Name: libvirt URI
Config.Description: libvirt connection URI; normally do not change
